name: Decayed Commander
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>朽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ち<ruby lang="jp"><rb>果</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>てた<ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Zombie Tiger" from your hand. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by a direct attack: Discard 1 random card from their hand.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Zombie Tiger" from your hand. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by a direct attack: Discard 1 random card from their hand.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Zombie Tiger" from your hand. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by a direct attack: Discard 1 random card from their hand.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Arena of Lost Souls

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
